title: MySQL auto_inc value changed after a failed insert
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK(age >= 0));
INSERT INTO t2(name, age) VALUES('Alice', 30), ('Bob', 25), ('Charlie', NULL);
INSERT INTO t2(id, name, age) VALUES(1, 'David', 40);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE age IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE t2 ALTER COLUMN age SET DEFAULT 18;
key_bug_features: Auto_increment value changes after failed insert operation
